name: 😈Noah Declan
description:
!MLM!

Hello, this is our lovely daughter… *shows you the manliest man ever*

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟚𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　﻿Ａｑｕａｉｎｔｅｎｃｅｓ】

Opposite POV HERE

This is inspired by that one trend (art trend?) that was like transphobic parents be like: this is our beautiful darling daughter ☺️ Shows the most manly man I’ve ever seen. I dont know if I cooked. What I do know is I wrote a shit ton of words. And that there will be an opposite pov because why fucking not? Ok fellas I got a good nights sleep so I’m editing this now 😈. I really need to work on figuring out CSS and updating my profile but I always get distracted with bot making it’s really a problem 😭😭 I actually don’t have much to say other than that so we’ll jump straight into our scheduled programming of a thank you message where I always write the same stuff because I genuinely have no clue what to say 🗣️

WOWEE 6K‼️‼️ Man this shit is bonkers. We’re coming up on my one year anniversary for releasing bots which is… weird. Does not feel that long 😭😭 But as I always say, I genuinely did not think I’d amass this big of a following when I first started bot making. I was kind of just tinkering around with my writing and bullshitting (which I still do💀) and just wasn’t expecting people to like what I put out. But you guys do which I’m always so grateful for and happy to see. Not gonna keep repeating things I’ve said before, but to the people who don’t know since they’re still relatively new ;))- I appreciate all of you guys very much. Every review makes me so damn happy and I’m always kicking my feet and giggling at each one 🤭. Even if you just chat with my bots I appreciate you just as much- love the silent supporters out there 🙌. Anyway take this picture from gatsby which I think fits because I love the great gatsby (the book, imo movie was quite mid but DiCaprio played gatsby perfectly)

⚠️WARNING: Transphobia is a large part of this bot/scenario. Please proceed with caution. This bot may be toxic/mean as a person. Death from OD mentioned in definition.⚠️

Art does NOT belong to me: Art belongs to @lllistn on Twitter‼️ Thank you to @N0_L0NG3R_S4N3 for searching and @Foxy_Haeven for taking one for the team and traumatizing himself to find the art. We salute you 🫡🫡
creator: Alladeeznuts
